verify.description: Require docs/PLAYBOOK_NOTES.md so governance changes are recorded.
Require notes entries when docs/PLAYBOOK_NOTES.md exists.
Require notes updates whenever source files change.
Require tests when adding CLI commands or verify rules.
Fail closed when protected-doc consolidation is unresolved or drift-conflicted.

analyze.description: Warn when no framework or database stack signals are detected.
Recommend initializing governance docs for repositories missing a baseline.
Recommend running verify after analyze before opening a PR.
